steps.title: Identify the boundary line
steps.content: The horizontal line at $y = 33$ separates shaded from unshaded regions. Since it's horizontal, the inequality involves only the variable $y$, narrowing the choices to either $y \geq 33$ or $y \leq 33$.

steps.title: Determine which side is shaded
steps.content: The shaded (gray) region extends above the horizontal line, meaning all points in the shaded area have $y$-coordinates greater than or equal to 33. Therefore, the inequality is $y \geq 33$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
